name: Macaroni a L'italienne
recipeInstructions:
1. Scald milk in a double boiler.
2. In a bowl, rub flour and butter together until smooth.
3. Whisk the flour mixture into the scalded milk.
4. Stir continuously over heat until thickened.
5. Add salt, pepper to taste, cayenne, whipping cream, cheese, and mustard (if using).
6. Cook macaroni according to package directions.
7. Drain well and arrange in a serving dish.
8. Stir the sauce into the cooked macaroni and serve.
